Huntingdon/Station 2 South Capacity for January 24 - 26, 2026


Notice Text:

Further to Notice #169242, Westcoast will be allowing the following flow on T South:

Huntingdon Delivery Area Capacity

January 24 - 26, 2026: 2,209,572 GJ

Station 2 South Capacity

January 24 - 26, 2026: 2,344,412 GJ

Changes in operating conditions may result in the capacity being recalled on any gas cycle.

If you have any questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800.
